description: Calculate the total fuel consumption in Metric Tonnes for a multi-leg voyage plan defined in Bridge Command's scenario format. Using the route file at '/home/ga/Documents/VoyageData/planned_route.ini' and the engine performance CSV at '/home/ga/Documents/VoyageData/engine_curve.csv', determine the distance and duration for each leg using the Haversine formula (Earth Radius = 3440.06 NM). Linearly interpolate the daily fuel consumption rate for each leg's speed from the engine curve. Generate a report at '/home/ga/Documents/fuel_report.txt' listing each leg's details and the final 'TOTAL FUEL REQUIRED'.
